title: Apocalyptic Buckets
description: A fully remade and WIP version of the old apocalyptic buckets mod from 1.7 and 1.5 also now supports fabric
body:
# Apocalyptic Buckets Mod

The **Apocalyptic Buckets Mod** is an exciting and updated version of the classic apocalyptic buckets mod from Minecraft 1.7 and 1.5, now supporting **Fabric**. This mod introduces 4 Apocalyptic Buckets that trigger massive, world-destroying floods of lava, water, darkness, and toxic water, adding a new level of chaos and excitement to your Minecraft experience.

## Current Features

### Available Buckets

- **Tsunami Bucket**: Unleashes a massive tsunami that floods the world.
- **Lava Tsunami Bucket**: Creates a devastating lava flood that burns everything in its path.
- **Toxic Bucket**: Spreads a deadly toxic flood, turning all entities that touch it into zombies.
- **Void Bucket**: A black void spreading quickly across your world more dark the nigh sky.

### Work in Progress

- **Paint Buckets**: Adding new methods of destruction; **these buckets are still under development**.
- **Fire Bucket**: Designed to spread flames everywhere even through the air; **currently in progress**.

_**Strong pc** Recommended if you plan on letting the floods go for a long time._
